items.title: Sample: Rincon access path concern
items.public_summary: Residents reported intermittent obstruction near a coastal access path. The platform tracks source-backed updates and agency responses.
items.internal_summary: Keep wording neutral. Source reporting supports a reported access concern but not a legal conclusion.

items.title: Sample: Aguadilla shoreline project update
items.public_summary: Coverage describes a shoreline development proposal and the status of agency filings. The case tracks source-backed updates over time.
items.internal_summary: Approved after reviewer removed speculative language about permitting outcome.

items.title: Sample: Loiza shoreline erosion response
items.public_summary: Reports describe shoreline erosion impacts and a response measure under discussion. The case tracks cited reporting and official statements.
items.internal_summary: Location intentionally coarse because sources do not support parcel-level precision.

items.title: Sample: Salinas permitting notice under review
items.public_summary: A newly discovered article is under review and is not yet eligible for publication.
items.internal_summary: Potential legal-claim language requires review before any public summary is exposed.
